features: Many of our customers are fans of Oven Mate's powerful oven cleaner, so they'll be pleased to hear that their favourite cleaning experts have turned their attention to all your stainless steel appliances too
Oven Mate House Mate Stainless Steel Clean and Polish is a powerful cleaner which lifts dirt and grime, leaving behind a brilliant, smear-free shine
Simply spray on House Mate Stainless Steel Clean and Polish to easily lift dirt and grease, then buff off with a soft, dry cloth to leave your oven doors, cooker hoods, fridges and hobs gleaming
Added protectors leave an invisible film that repels finger marks, oils, water and smears, and helps stop dirt and grease building up again
description: Product Description A powerful cleaner which lifts dirt and grime, leaving behind a brilliant, smear-free shine.  An invisible, protective layer resists fingermarks, and helps prevent dirt adhering, making the polished surface easier to clean next time.  Suitable for all your stainless steel appliances, including hobs, oven doors, extractors, and any stainless steel. Directions Shake the can well, and spray over the area to be polished. For flat, heavily soiled areas (such as hobs) where the product will not run down, leave for a few minutes before wiping off with a soft cloth. Otherwise, spray and wipe clean immediately. Box Contains 1x House Mate Stainless Steel Cleaner & Polisher See more
